debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝ : CommRing R
ι : Type
I : ι → Ideal R
⊢ Injective ⇑(@Ideal.chineseMap R inst✝ ι I)

proof:
rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨y, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Ideal.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mp (hx i)
failed_attempts:
rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  obtain ⟨r, rfl⟩ := Quotient.mk_surjective x
  apply Quotient.sound
  rw [Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' r i, hx]
  rfl

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  induction x using Quotient.inductionOn with r
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' I r i, hx]
  rfl

intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨y, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  apply Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.2
  rw [Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.1 (hx i)

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨y, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  rw [Quotient.mk_eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  specialize hx i
  rw [Pi.zero_apply, Quotient.mk_eq_zero_iff_mem] at hx
  exact hx

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨r, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  rw [Quotient.mk_eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.mk_eq_zero_iff_mem]
  exact hx i

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨y, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact (Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem _).mp (hx i)

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  induction x using Quotient.inductionOn
  rw [chineseMap_mk] at hx
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.1 (congr_fun hx i)

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨r, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  simp [Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hx
  rwa [Quotient.mk_eq_zero, Submodule.mem_iInf]

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  induction x using Quotient.inductionOn with
  | h r =>
    rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
    rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Submodule.mem_iInf]
    intro i
    rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact hx i

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]

  rw [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at hx
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mp (congr_fun hx i)

  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i

  rwa [Pi.zero_apply, Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at hx

intro x y h
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := Quotient.mk_surjective x
  obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := Quotient.mk_surjective y
  rw [chineseMap_mk, chineseMap_mk, funext_iff] at h
  rw [Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  specialize h i
  rwa [Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem] at h

  simp only [chineseMap_mk', Pi.zero_apply, Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at hx

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
